purpose: Prerequisite videos for Grade 4 NCERT Chapter 8: Weigh it, Pour it
description: Videos covering: heavy and light comparison, full and empty containers, basic multiplication for conversions

videos.title: Heavy and Light | Comparing Weights for Kids
videos.description: Learn to compare objects as heavy or light. Which is heavier, a watermelon or an apple? Use your hands like a balance to find out!
learningObjectives: Compare objects as heavy or light
Understand that bigger does not always mean heavier
Use a balance to compare weights
followUpTopics: Measuring weight in grams and kilograms

videos.title: Full, Empty, and Half Full | Capacity for Beginners
videos.description: Learn about full, empty, and half full containers. See how we describe how much water or juice is in a glass, bottle, or bucket.
learningObjectives: Identify full, empty, and half-full containers
followUpTopics: Measuring capacity in millilitres and litres

videos.title: Multiplication by 10, 100, and 1000 | Easy Multiplication Tricks
videos.description: Learn how to multiply by 10, 100, and 1000 quickly. This is very important for converting between grams and kilograms, and millilitres and litres!
learningObjectives: Understand the pattern of adding zeros

usageNotes.purpose: Review heavy/light comparison, full/empty concepts, and multiplication by 1000 before learning measurement in Chapter 8
usageNotes.recommendationStrategy: Select based on weak concepts identified in readiness assessment
usageNotes.sequencing: Heavy and light comparison → Full and empty containers → Multiplication by 1000
